image_prompt: A close-up, highly detailed and vibrant image of a person's face mid-expression, eyes wide with exaggerated delight and a comical 'sugar rush' effect, as they bite into a luxurious, melting piece of dark chocolate. Swirls of cocoa and golden light emanate from the chocolate. The Portuguese text 'Chocolate é doce.' is playfully written in edible-looking chocolate script across the background or appearing as a thought bubble above their head. Cinematic lighting, rich textures, Imagen 3 style.
caption: Alerta de obviedade deliciosa! 🍫 Quem concorda que essa é a melhor verdade do universo? Marque aquele amigo que não vive sem um docinho! Qual seu chocolate favorito? 👇 #ChocolateDoce #VerdadesUniversais #AmorPorChocolate #DoceVida #ObvioMasGostoso
